description: Letter from an unidentified man, in Fustat, to his brother al-Musāfir al-Kattānī ('the traveling flax-merchant'), in Aṭfīḥ. The writer urges the addressee to come back soon. He reports that the ṣāḥib al-ʿasl (owner of the honey) arrived but the writer managed to get rid of him by making a vow and saying something about his brother. Regards from Ṣadaq b. al-Ṭāqī, Abū Naṣr, Faḍā'il, and Ḥasūn.
description_he: מכתב מגבר בפוסטאט לאחיו המסאפר אל-כתאני באטפיח; מדרבן לחזור; מדווח על פטירת בעל הדבש בשבועה
